overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a futuristic sci-fi showroom called FORGE. The player walks through sleek corridors and exhibition spaces featuring a large animated mech display and weapon exhibits. The environment features clean modern architecture with teal accent lighting and natural light from skylights.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with glass wall overlooking water feature

events.description: firing weapon at glass wall creating spark and splash effects

agents.ego_description: walking through corridor while shooting at the glass water feature wall on the right

entered.detail: white and glass safety railing along the corridor edge
large glass wall with water splashing against the other side
polished white marble flooring with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow futuristic corridor with polished marble floors. To the right, a glass wall reveals a water feature with splashing effects. The player fires their weapon at the glass, creating sparks, while approaching a corner with a wall-mounted screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: main exhibition hall with FORGE mech display

events.description: large holographic mech display activates with animation sequence

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the large mech vehicle display in the center of the room

entered.detail: large rectangular platform with FORGE branding and holographic projection
massive vertical screen displaying an animated quadruped mech vehicle
wall-mounted display showing vehicle schematics and specifications
rectangular glass skylight allowing natural daylight into the space

segments.scene_description: The player enters a spacious exhibition hall with carpeted flooring and skylights overhead. The central focus is a large FORGE display platform featuring a holographic mech vehicle animation on a massive screen. Wall monitors show technical specifications as the player circles the exhibit.

scene_state.functional_zone: side exhibition area with weapon display case

events.description: moving from main mech display to side weapon exhibit area

agents.ego_description: examining the weapon display case containing a rifle and ammunition

entered.detail: glass case containing a rifle, ammunition cartridges, and tactical equipment
white standing tablet with interactive screen displaying information
modern yellow upholstered seating against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves to a side exhibition area featuring a glass weapon display case with a rifle and ammo. A digital information kiosk stands nearby, and yellow lounge seating is visible against the wall. The FORGE platform is now visible in the background to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand lobby with staircase and upper balcony

events.description: entering the main lobby area with grand staircase and multiple skylights

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious lobby observing the architecture and upper levels

entered.detail: wide curved staircase with white steps and glass railing leading to upper level
overlooking balcony with glass railing on the second floor
suspended aircraft or drone model hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a grand lobby with polished marble floors and abundant natural light from multiple skylights. A sweeping curved staircase dominates the right side, leading to an upper balcony. A hanging drone model is suspended from the high ceiling, and the space opens up to show multiple exhibition areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, sterile corridor into a vast, light-filled architectural lobby. It begins by moving along polished marble floors past a glass water feature, where weapon fire creates sparks against the surface before the camera rounds a corner. As the space opens up, the scene shifts into a spacious exhibition hall under bright skylights, circling a massive holographic mech display and its surrounding technical monitors. The camera then glides toward a side gallery featuring a glass weapon case and yellow lounge seating, leaving the central FORGE platform in the background. Finally, the movement leads into a grand, sun-drenched lobby dominated by a sweeping curved staircase and a drone model suspended from the high ceiling.
